zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Ashton於1440年出生在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林時，她的父親SIR RALPH ASHTON19歲，母親LADY MARGARET DE BARTON19歲。她和Nicholas Rigby II至少有1個兒子。她去世於1507年4月25日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾利藍德享年67歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Ashton于1440年出生在英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林时，她的父亲SIR RALPH ASHTON19岁，母亲LADY MARGARET DE BARTON19岁。她和Nicholas Rigby II至少有1个儿子。她去世于1507年4月25日在英国英格兰藍卡爾利藍德享年67岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Ashton was born in 1440, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, her father, SIR RALPH ASHTON, was 19 and her mother, LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, was 19. She had at least 1 son with Nicholas Rigby II. She died on 25 April 1507, in Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Lancaster, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Ashton est née en 1440, à Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, SIR RALPH ASHTON, avait 19 ans et sa mère, LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Nicholas Rigby II. Elle est décédée le 25 avril 1507, à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Ashton 1440 in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater SIR RALPH ASHTON 19 und ihre Mutter LADY MARGARET DE BARTON 19. Sie hatte mit Nicholas Rigby II mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 25. April 1507 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lancaster, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Ashton è nata il nel 1440 nel Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, sua padre, SIR RALPH ASHTON, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Nicholas Rigby II. Morì il 25 aprile 1507, nel Leyland, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Lancaster, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Ashtonが1440年にイギリスランカシュアイアアシュトン-ウンデル-リンで生まれた時，父SIR RALPH ASHTONは19歳，母LADY MARGARET DE BARTONは19歳であった。彼女はNicholas Rigby IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1507年4月25日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアリーランドで67歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアランカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Ashton(이)가 1440년 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 SIR RALPH ASHTON(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 LADY MARGARET DE BARTON(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Nicholas Rigby II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 4월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리랜드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Ashton nasceu em 1440, em Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, SIR RALPH ASHTON, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Nicholas Rigby II. Ela faleceu em 25 de abril de 1507, em Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Ashton родилась в 1440 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени SIR RALPH ASHTON было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Nicholas Rigby II. Она умерла 25 апреля 1507 г. в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Ashton nació en 1440, en Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, SIR RALPH ASHTON, tenía 19 años y su mamá, LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Nicholas Rigby II. Murió el 25 de abril de 1507, en Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
